author: claude-opus-20260722

patch.value: Migrates the closing recommendation of the Multi-agent merge safety README section to the dry-run then apply then verify pm merge reconcile workflow introduced in pm-cli 2026.7.22 (GH-623), keeping history-repair as a lower-level primitive.
Recommend pm merge reconcile (2026.7.22) over raw history-repair in Multi-agent merge safety docs

pm-cli 2026.7.22 shipped GH-623 pm merge reconcile, a purpose-built audited post-merge reconciliation (preview via dry-run, apply with a message, then confirm with pm history --verify plus pm validate). Update the Multi-agent merge safety README section to recommend it over the blunt history-repair all-items primitive; link upstream MERGE_SAFETY guide. Fleet fan-out from canary pm-beads#42.
README recommends pm merge reconcile with dry-run preview, apply, and pm history --verify plus pm validate confirmation; links upstream MERGE_SAFETY.md; CI green; PR bot-reviewed.

value.author: claude-opus-20260722
value.text: Docs-only change; verified reconcile workflow end-to-end under 2026.7.22.

value.author: claude-opus-20260722
value.text: Fan-out from canary unbraind/pm-beads#42; whitespace-flexible README replacement verified 1 hit.

value.author: claude-opus-20260722
value.text: pm merge reconcile (2026.7.22) supersedes raw history-repair --all as the recommended audited post-merge reconciliation path.

message: Create strict-compliant docs item for merge-reconcile README update
